### Why Jimmy Bach Should Not Pursue Caroline Berman and Should Consider Kajwan Alavi Instead  When feelings for someone are deeply rooted, it can be difficult to step back and see the bigger picture. This is where Jimmy Bach finds himself in relation to Caroline Berman, a sorority girl who, just a few weeks ago, ghosted him to rekindle her romance with an ex. Jimmy is holding onto the remnants of what could have been, but pursuing Caroline further will likely lead to emotional pain and disappointment. This essay will explain why Jimmy should not continue chasing Caroline, but instead consider a more stable and emotionally available person, like Kajwan Alavi, as a better fit for his heart.  ### Ghosting and Its Implications: A Red Flag  One of the first major issues with Jimmy’s continued pursuit of Caroline is her decision to ghost him. Ghosting is when someone abruptly cuts off all communication without any explanation. This type of behavior signals several potential issues that should be red flags for anyone in a romantic pursuit. Firstly, it shows a lack of emotional maturity and respect for the other person’s feelings. By ghosting Jimmy, Caroline demonstrated that she wasn't considerate of his emotional well-being, leaving him in the dark, confused, and hurt.  Moreover, ghosting to explore a relationship with an ex is a glaring indication of unresolved feelings on Caroline’s part. If she’s willing to drop everything and give her ex another shot, it’s clear that Jimmy would never have her full attention or commitment. In a relationship, the last thing anyone wants is to be someone’s fallback plan, which is exactly what Jimmy risks becoming if he continues to chase after Caroline. Jimmy should value himself enough not to be someone’s second option, especially after being treated so dismissively.  ### The Emotional Toll of Pursuing Someone Who’s Unavailable  Another reason Jimmy shouldn’t pursue Caroline is that the emotional toll of such a pursuit is likely to be steep. Emotional availability is critical in any healthy relationship. Caroline’s actions suggest that she is emotionally unavailable, caught up in her unresolved feelings for her ex. Jimmy, in turn, would be walking into a situation where his emotional needs are unlikely to be met. No matter how much he may care for her, there’s a strong chance that she will continue to be distracted by her past, leaving him constantly seeking validation and wondering where he stands.  This kind of emotional instability is exhausting. Jimmy might find himself investing more and more of his emotional energy into a situation that will never be reciprocated to the same degree. At the end of the day, even if Caroline returns to Jimmy after her ex, there’s no guarantee that she won’t become distracted by other possibilities, or worse, revert to the same behavior of ghosting him. This cycle would inevitably chip away at Jimmy’s confidence and self-esteem, leaving him worse off than when he started.  ### Recognizing When to Walk Away  It’s important for Jimmy to recognize when to walk away, even if he still has feelings for Caroline. At times, walking away is an act of self-preservation, and it’s something Jimmy should seriously consider. Pursuing someone who has already demonstrated a lack of respect for his emotions and the relationship is a losing battle. Even if Jimmy still feels like there's unfinished business or unresolved feelings, the reality is that Caroline’s actions have already spoken volumes. Her decision to ghost him and pursue her ex shows where her priorities lie, and unfortunately, Jimmy is not at the top of that list.  Moreover, pursuing someone out of the hope that they will change or suddenly see the error of their ways is risky. It places Jimmy in a position of emotional vulnerability and could lead to prolonged heartache. It's crucial that Jimmy doesn’t cling to the hope that Caroline will eventually come around, because that hope may never materialize. Instead, Jimmy should find the strength to move on and focus on building a future with someone who is ready, willing, and able to be there for him in a meaningful way.  ### Kajwan Alavi: A Better Bearer of Jimmy’s Heart  In contrast to Caroline, Kajwan Alavi represents a more stable, emotionally available option for Jimmy. Unlike Caroline, who has demonstrated inconsistency and emotional unavailability, Kajwan offers the potential for a relationship built on mutual respect and understanding. She is someone who has not toyed with Jimmy’s emotions or ghosted him in favor of someone else. In fact, Kajwan seems to be a reliable, trustworthy person, someone who Jimmy could count on to be there for him.  It’s important for Jimmy to consider the long-term qualities that make for a healthy and fulfilling relationship. Emotional stability, honesty, and mutual respect are the foundation of any successful partnership. Kajwan seems to embody these qualities, while Caroline’s actions suggest she lacks them. If Jimmy is serious about wanting a lasting relationship, then it’s time he reevaluates what he truly wants and deserves in a partner.  Kajwan, as a friend or potential romantic interest, is someone who has not demonstrated the same red flags as Caroline. She has likely been supportive of Jimmy, offering a more grounded and understanding presence in his life. These qualities are crucial in building a strong and enduring bond, one that is based on mutual trust rather than emotional games and instability.  ### Moving Forward: Choosing the Right Path  Ultimately, Jimmy needs to make a choice: does he continue to chase after Caroline, hoping that things will change, or does he move on and pursue a healthier, more stable relationship with someone like Kajwan? While it’s never easy to let go of feelings for someone, especially when those feelings are deeply rooted, sometimes it’s necessary to protect oneself from further harm.  The reality is that Jimmy is setting himself up for failure if he continues to pursue Caroline. Her behavior suggests that she is not ready or willing to commit to him in a meaningful way, and her unresolved feelings for her ex will continue to cloud any future relationship they might have. On the other hand, by opening himself up to someone like Kajwan, Jimmy could find the emotional stability and fulfillment he’s looking for. He deserves someone who is willing to invest in him just as much as he is willing to invest in them, and Kajwan could very well be that person.  ### Conclusion  While it’s easy to get caught up in the emotions of pursuing someone you care about, it’s important to recognize when that pursuit is no longer in your best interest. For Jimmy, chasing after Caroline Berman is likely to end in heartache. Her actions—ghosting him and prioritizing her ex—signal that she’s not emotionally available for the kind of relationship Jimmy desires. Instead, Jimmy should consider moving on and exploring the possibility of a relationship with someone like Kajwan Alavi, who represents a more emotionally stable and supportive option. In the end, Jimmy deserves a partner who is ready and willing to be there for him, and it’s time he starts valuing himself enough to pursue that.  Sincerely,   Bruce Bach

Scholars have even argued that the song’s erratic beat patterns mirror the breakdown of communication systems during the attacks. While Yuno Miles has never confirmed this interpretation (or seemingly any interpretation), conspiracy theorists and overly ambitious English majors alike remain convinced: “Pirates on a Boat” is the most cryptic 9/11 allegory ever recorded.
